package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
  • Class
    Description
    DisableGoal
    Action enabling or disabling a selected set of goals.
    GUIAbstractTreeNode
     
    GUIOneStepChildTreeNode
    A special kind of gui proof tree node to show intermediate steps of the OneStepSimplifier.
    GUIProofTreeModel
    An implementation of TreeModel that can be displayed using the JTree class framework and reflects the state of a Proof object.
    ProofTreePopupFactory
    Factory for popup menus on proof nodes in the ProofTreeView.
    ProofTreePopupFactory.ProofTreeAction
     
    ProofTreePopupFactory.ProofTreeContext
     
    ProofTreeSettingsMenuFactory
    Factory for the settings menu of the ProofTreeView.
    ProofTreeView
    The proof tree view, showing the nodes of the proof.
    ProofTreeViewFilter
    Filters for the proof tree view.
    Style
     
    Style.Tooltip
    Wrapper class for the tooltip
